headline: Inference optimization and throughput scaling break out as efforts target 1000 tokens per second on trillion-parameter models.
body: Inference optimization broke out alongside new entrants throughput scaling and quantization, anchored by work on reaching 1000 tokens per second on a 1T-parameter model and NVIDIA guidance on NVFP4 training on Blackwell hardware. Apple moved on the foundation-model front, revealing an AI architecture built around Google Gemini models rather than proprietary alternatives, and surfacing its Core AI Framework. Frontier agentic capability advanced with Nex N2 Pro, a 400B-parameter model aimed at autonomous agent performance, while agent and AI engineering entered as new technique concepts. A reported supply-chain incident, in which Microsoft was compromised to deliver malware to Claude and Gemini users, added a security thread.

cited_items.title: Two Leaps to 1000 Tokens/s on a 1T-Parameter Model
Train Models Faster with JAX and MaxText Using NVFP4 on NVIDIA Blackwell
Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models
Nex N2 Pro: Frontier agentic performance at 400B
Microsoft Hacked to Deliver Malware to Claude and Gemini Users
